title: 1st Night: Fried Salted Salmon
overview: Murasaki Wakako is a twenty-seven year old working lady. As per her daily routine, she rewards herself for a hard day at work by bar-hopping in search of the best alcohol and seafood the world has to offer. On tonight's menu, she has some crispy fried salted salmon and cold sake. This ultimate combination makes her purr in satisfaction.

title: 2nd Night: Fried Chicken
overview: Freshly-fried food is out of this world! Tonight's menu is comprised of stuff that Wakako has strong cravings for every now and then, fried chicken and chilled beer. The beer goes perfectly with the chicken as it washes down the fresh'n'juicy aftertaste. Dig in while it's hot!

title: 3rd Night: Monkfish Liver in Ponzu
overview: Drown your sorrows in alcohol! On tonight's menu is a comfort meal, monkfish liver in ponzu accompanied by hot sake. After stuffing her face with the liver, Wakako washes it down with the sake. Even the worst days at the office can seem like no big deal after this.

title: 4th Night: Sea Urchin Cresson
overview: A local specialty! On tonight's menu is Hiroshima's famous sea urchin cresson and beer. When placed on a pan with melted butter, the urchins seem like they break out into a dance. And what else could go better with this working-class meal than a cold beer?

title: 5th Night: Yakitori
overview: The perfect plan! On tonight's menu is some charcoal-grilled yakitori and draft beer. With a glass of beer in hand, Wakako stuffs her face with the skewered yakitori and immediately washes it down with her drink. In that smoky ambience, this sip feels divine.

title: 6th Night: Steamed Clams
overview: After a tiring day's work, have some relaxing steamed clams and sake. The perfectly-prepared soup soaks into the clams and heals your exhausted body and soul. The sake goes down smoothly, perhaps aided by the feelings of gratitude towards the seven seas for providing this delicacy.

title: 7th Night: Potato Salad
overview: Nothing beats a good potato salad! On tonight's menu is the common man's best friend, potato salad, accompanied by oolong tea highball. The down-to-earth drink and potatoes form a top-class B+ duo, filling both your belly and your soul.
